mimic.disguise_description: A fat, promising chest sits alone in the room, a passage behind it.
mimic.search_warning: From here the chest looks wrong - the lid swells and settles like something breathing.
mimic.ambush_text: The chest splits open into a ring of teeth and lunges - a Mimic!
mimic.strike_first_text: You strike before it can spring, catching it open and helpless!

wandering.ambush_text: Something peels away from the shadows and rushes you!
